rows.label: tev079101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Feloran about the Doll discovered in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Feloran about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Feloran about the stolen Doll called "Vita."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Feloran about the stolen Doll called "Vita."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Feloran about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Feloran about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0001
rows.name:
We still don't have proof that
it's a Doll at all. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0002
rows.name:
In fact, it's quite possible
that it was simply some sort of
idol they worshiped. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Of course, we don't know what it might
be. *fsssh* But in an organization as
large as the Samaar Federation...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, it seems reasonable that there
would be some overwhelmingly powerful
presence at its heart. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0005
rows.name:
But if it is something they worship, then even if
its outward appearance is of a god, it's a safe bet
that an unspeakable demon lies within. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0010
rows.name:
As our people are often targets of
discrimination, I was a little uneasy
about coming to this city. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0011
rows.name:
But when I saw that there was a church in your
city, I realized that you were a cultured people
unlike the Growth. *fsssh* This was a relief.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Even if we worship different gods, I
know that evil will never claim those
who hold righteous beliefs. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Forgive me for not introducing myself
sooner. *fsssh* My name is Feloran,
and I am a religious scholar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0014
rows.name:
I hope that here I might be allowed
to continue my research into Golbogga
the Creator, our God. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0015
rows.name:
As my research progresses, I may offer investigative
work to the agents of BLADE. *fsssh* I hope that
you will be willing to hear me out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0020
rows.name:
The Doll stolen by Growth? They may indeed
have called it the "Vita." *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0021
rows.name:
But I am becoming more and more
convinced that it is regarded as
something like a god to them. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0022
rows.name:
It is hard to conceive of any other
reason they would infiltrate an enemy
base merely to retrieve it. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0023
rows.name:
I wonder what sort of power this god
holds in the eyes of the Growth? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0028
rows.name:
The Doll stolen by the
Growth... The "Vita," was it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0029
rows.name:
I saw in the BLADE database that it was
used by the Growth commander. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0030
rows.name:
A legend... The Great One's vessel... *fsssh*
Something vital that is missing... Hmmm. As I
suspected, there is a deeper meaning to this Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Lacking both the machine and its
passenger, I can investigate this
matter no further. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG0032
rows.name:
But I suspect it may be the key to
unlocking not just the secret of
humanity, but of everything. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG1001
rows.name:
Ah! It is the second coming of Golbogga!
I see you are busy with your usual desiring,
digging, and destroying. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG1002
rows.name:
Sadly, it appears this material you
call miranium is no substitute for the
voltant that covers Bedun. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG1003
rows.name:
Please do try to find a better material. *fsssh* One
that, say, emits poison gases when mined and creates
toxic byproducts when used in manufacturing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG1004
rows.name:
And know that no matter how deeply
it pollutes, we stand at the ready
to devoltanize it. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG2001
rows.name:
I received word from Kiliran
about Toluera. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG2002
rows.name:
He said he had run away in a deranged
state, likely due to his inability to
acknowledge the truth of Golbogga. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG2003
rows.name:
This can only mean that Kiliran has
discovered proof of Golbogga's existence
and showed it to Toluera! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG2004
rows.name:
I had worried that you might have
betrayed me as well, but now I stand
grateful for your fine work. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079101_MSG2005
rows.name:
Ah, if only I could have seen
Golbogga take physical form
with my own eyes! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
